channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
item.description: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

item.title: For its 40th birthday, IKEA has created a collection of its most iconic products — and I bet you have at least one of them somewhere in your home
item.description: Take a tour of the IKEA inventions that have stood the test of time — from Billy to Kallux.
